loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy for the current month; subsidy and target metrics are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing input power and energy delta — UPS efficiency and loss are derived from total active power and energy imports, as specific output energy and loss-ratio metrics are not directly logged for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load trend and load factor — expected load profiles, anomaly events, and threshold ratings are not measured by this UPS meter.
